narrative:
Pataskala 1-B (precinct in Licking County) has 2,390 registered voters, with 61.8% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 20.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.2%, a modest Republican lean of 3.7 percentage points.
